stories.headline: Reform UK proposes £100m 'round-the-clock' security plan for MPs
stories.description: The policy was announced after police said party spokeswoman Ann Widdecombe was killed in a "targeted attack".

stories.headline: Protest in Pakistan’s Kashmir stalls after nine killed in clashes
stories.description: At least 28 people have been killed since protests began in June, as the region braces for a major protest march.

stories.headline: Israeli air attack on Gaza apartment kills family of three
stories.description: One child survives hit on Deir el-Balah home as Israel escalates attacks across territory despite October ‘ceasefire’.

stories.headline: DRC Ebola cases surpass 2,000 as more health workers begin strike
stories.description: Health workers in Democratic Republic of the Congo’s Ituri province strike over unpaid wages as death toll rises to 754.

mainLocation.name: BUNIA, DEMOCRATIC REPUBLIC OF THE CONGO

stories.headline: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
stories.description: Trump vowed to strike Iran's infrastructure next week if the country does not return to talks.
